mainEntity.name: I failed a drug test after my forklift accident—is my claim automatically denied?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not necessarily. The insurer must typically prove the intoxication actually caused the accident. If mechanical failure or someone else's mistake caused the crash, you may still be eligible for benefits.
